> Signature Treatments:

> Signature Body Treatment:
> 
> The treatment begins with your choice of a luxurious
> full body application
> of healing Brazilian Propolis or a hydrating herbal
> oil infusion.  After
> which, you will be cocooned in a thermal blanket
> while you will receive
> soothing neck and foot massage.   Emerging from this
> wrap you will be
> treated to a final application of our  signature
> enzyme lotion which will
> replenish, hydrate and fortify your skin.

> Signature facial:
> 
> Choose from 3 of our 60 minute signature facials: 
> 
> Alpha Omega Facial

> Utilizing botanicals, vitamins, trace minerals and

body_html:
give to tatiana

--- Lesley Groff lesley@nysgllc.com wrote:

From: Giulia Pistorio
[mailto:gpistorio@thecoreclub.com]
Sent: Thursday, January 12, 2006 9:43 AM
To: LESLEY@NYSGLLC.COM
Subject: TCC Holiday Gift Spa Menu

Dear Mr. Epstein,

Good Morning!

I have received a lot of feedback from the January
newsletter with regards
to the complimentary TCC post holiday gift. Please
see the following menu
for the signature treatments that are being offered
from the spa. (Remember
you have a choice of either a spa treatment or
breakfast for 4 people)

If you have any additional questions or concerns,
please feel free to
contact me.

I look forward to working with you in this New
Year!!

With Regards,

Giulia

Signature Treatments:

Signature Body Treatment:

The treatment begins with your choice of a luxurious
full body application
of healing Brazilian Propolis or a hydrating herbal
oil infusion. After
which, you will be cocooned in a thermal blanket
while you will receive
soothing neck and foot massage. Emerging from this
wrap you will be
treated to a final application of our signature
enzyme lotion which will
replenish, hydrate and fortify your skin.

Signature facial:

Choose from 3 of our 60 minute signature facials:

Alpha Omega Facial

Utilizing botanicals, vitamins, trace minerals and
amino acids and
incorporating superior manual exfoliation, this
treatment is particularly
useful in combating the signs of aging skin,
restoring a more vibrant and
youthful appearance.

Revitalizing Facial

A rejuvenating treatment that restores health and
vitality by boosting the
skin's ability to heal itself while offering
protection from environmental
factors.

Bio-Energetic Facial

Applying concepts from the emerging fields of
bio-energetic medicine,
herbology, aromatherapy and phyto-nutrition, we
present a personalized
formulation of holistic treatment products and
treatment applications to
deliver healthy and luminous skin through proper
repair, restoration,
protection and maintenance.

Signature manicure/pedicure:

A nourishing facial for your hands and feet which
includes a meticulous
cleaning and shaping concluded by polish application
or buffing
